reviewer_notes: This page is a preface/introduction ('本書の目的はただ１つ') describing the book's purpose and four key features. It is not learning content in the ITパスポート exam sense — it is a publisher preface. The 'other' label (preface) is more accurate, though 'content' is defensible if preface pages are grouped under content. OCR quality is excellent; all headings and body paragraphs faithfully reproduced including bold/highlighted phrases.
